debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂φ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, Pose.rotM₂φ]
  conv_lhs => arg 2; arg 1; ext x; rw [div_eq_inv_mul]
  rw [fderiv_const_mul _ (by simp only [inner, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]; fun_prop)]
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  by_cases hP : ‖P‖ = 0
  · have hP0 : P = 0 := by rwa [norm_eq_zero] at hP
    subst hP0
    simp [rotMφ, inner, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_three, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
  · rw [mul_comm ‖P‖, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel₀ hP, mul_one]
    rw [fderiv_inner_apply ℝ
      (by simp only [inner, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]; fun_prop)
      (differentiableAt_const _)]
    simp only [fderiv_const, Pi.zero_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, inner_zero_left, add_zero]
    congr 1
    have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun (x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) => (rotM (x 0) (x 1)) P) pbar.outerParams := by
      simp only [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]; fun_prop
    have hline : HasDerivAt (fun t : ℝ => pbar.outerParams + t • EuclideanSpace.single (1 : Fin 2) (1 : ℝ))
      (EuclideanSpace.single (1 : Fin 2) (1 : ℝ)) 0 := by
      have := (hasDerivAt_id (0 : ℝ)).smul_const (EuclideanSpace.single (1 : Fin 2) (1 : ℝ))
      simp at this; exact this.const_add _
    have hcomp := hf.hasFDerivAt.comp_hasDerivAt 0 hline
    have h0 : ∀ t, (pbar.outerParams + t • EuclideanSpace.single (1 : Fin 2) (1 : ℝ)) 0 = pbar.θ₂ := by
      intro t; simp [Pose.outerParams, EuclideanSpace.single, WithLp.toLp, PiLp.add_apply, PiLp.smul_apply]; ring
    have h1 : ∀ t, (pbar.outerParams + t • EuclideanSpace.single (1 : Fin 2) (1 : ℝ)) 1 = pbar.φ₂ + t := by
      intro t; simp [Pose.outerParams, EuclideanSpace.single, WithLp.toLp, PiLp.add_apply, PiLp.smul_apply]; ring
    simp_rw [h0, h1] at hcomp
    have hgoal : HasDerivAt (fun t => (rotM pbar.θ₂ (pbar.φ₂ + t)) P) ((rotMφ pbar.θ₂ pbar.φ₂) P) 0 := by
      rw [hasDerivAt_pi]; intro i; fin_cases i
      · simp [rotM, rotM_mat, rotMφ, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_three, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
        exact hasDerivAt_const _ _
      · simp only [rotM, rotM_mat, rotMφ, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_three, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
        have hc : HasDerivAt (fun t => Real.cos (φ₂ + t)) (-Real.sin φ₂) 0 := by
          have := (Real.hasDerivAt_cos (φ₂ + 0)).comp 0 ((hasDerivAt_id 0).const_add φ₂)
          simp at this; convert this using 1; ring
        have hs : HasDerivAt (fun t => Real.sin (φ₂ + t)) (Real.cos φ₂) 0 := by
          have := (Real.hasDerivAt_sin (φ₂ + 0)).comp 0 ((hasDerivAt_id 0).const_add φ₂)
          simp at this; convert this using 1; ring
        convert ((hc.const_mul (-Real.cos θ₂)).mul_const (P 0) |>.add
          ((hc.const_mul (-Real.sin θ₂)).mul_const (P 1)) |>.add (hs.mul_const (P 2))) using 1; ring
    exact HasDerivAt.unique hcomp hgoal
